pat.batch_grant.interface_reason: Reviewed composite PAT authorization workflow: grant planning/execution uses pat.batch_plan and pat.batch_grant, while --revoke routes one scope to pat.scope_revoke; no single pinned RPC represents every executable mode.

pat.browser_policy.interface_reason: 命令仅操作本地进程或策略文件，不调用 MCP 接口
